case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA VS. WESTERN INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTERN INSURANCE COMPANY $35,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,410.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
